indication: OPDIVO (nivolumab) in combination with ipilimumab, is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic NSCLC, expressing PD-L1 ≥ 1% as determined by a validated test, with no EGFR or ALK genomic tumour aberrations, and no prior systemic therapy for metastatic NSCLC.
description: Health Canada approved nivolumab in combination with ipilimumab, for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic NSCLC, expressing PD-L1 ≥ 1% as determined by a validated test, with no EGFR or ALK genomic tumour aberrations, and no prior systemic therapy for metastatic NSCLC.
raw_biomarkers: PD-L1 ≥ 1% with no EGFR or ALK genomic tumour aberrations
